title: bulbophyllum tremulum
intro: Bulbophyllum tremulum, also known as the "flickering torch orchid", is a species of epiphytic orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum tremulum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the roots and leaves to make a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments.
